1709320.name: Five Likes Please
1709320.description:
Five Likes Please is a fast-paced multiplayer arena shooter. Build your arsenal by obtaining new weapons and unlocking attachments. Obtain "likes" and buy powerful streaks, such as vehicles and power weapons. Choose from 50+ unique weapons to bring into battle, ranging from pistols to rocket launchers. You can also completely customize each one using a gunsmith system to your liking. Choose carefully from the list of attachments available in order to suite your playstyle. Some notable features of this game include

  • 50+ unique weapons
  • 90+ unique attachments
  • 40+ additional guns available through DLC
  • Several classic gamemodes
  • A variety of equipment, vehicles, and power weapons
  • Simple, stylistic graphics
